outlook.summary: Positive total GEX across the 0DTE and Weekly expiries indicates a stable, range-bound market pinned between major call and put walls. Persistent bearish volatility skews and high put/call ratios reveal underlying anxiety, driving heavy hedging flows that create exceptionally strong structural support levels.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call OI convergence across all expiries (0DTE 9306, Weekly 8594, Monthly 25748). Aligned precisely with the 0DTE Gamma Flip, creating an absolute structural ceiling.
0DTE Max Pain, massive Weekly Put OI (19956), and huge Monthly Call/Put open interest convergence. Acts as the primary gravitational pull and structural floor.
Largest single open interest in the dataset (228,957) located in the Monthly expiration. Acts as the ultimate institutional macro floor.
Extreme 0DTE volume (80k+) and high OI in both 0DTE and Weekly expirations. Spot price is actively battling this immediate-term level.
The exact strike where cumulative GEX shifts positive to negative in the 0DTE timeframe. Breaks above here alter the intraday volatility regime.
Significant Put OI in 0DTE (11059), Weekly (11355), and Monthly (39579). Provides a strong secondary downside floor below 600.
Significant Monthly Call OI (36117) establishing the extreme upper boundary of the expected monthly volatility range.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected. Strongly positive total GEX across all expiries suppresses volatility and pins price.
outlook.summary: The market exhibits a stable, positive GEX environment indicating dealer hedging will suppress volatility. A powerful multi-expiry Call Wall Resonance at 25200 strictly limits upside, while the 0DTE Gamma Flip near 24805 provides immediate structural support. Expect price action to be highly contained within this 400-point range.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call OI across 0DTE, Weekly, and Monthly expirations. Peak upside resistance and primary dealer hedging cap.
Heavy Put OI across all three expirations. Confluent with Monthly Max Pain, creating massive structural support.
0DTE Gamma Flip directly below spot. Positive GEX keeps dealers long gamma, defending this intraday equilibrium.
High Call OI concentration in 0DTE and WEEKLY expiries. Forms a secondary resistance ceiling behind the 25200 resonance.
0DTE Put OI and massive Monthly Call OI create a deep harmonic level just above the 24000 support.
Highest Weekly Call OI directly above the 0DTE Gamma Flip. Activates as immediate short-term resistance.
Highest Monthly Call OI far above spot, establishing the absolute upside boundary for the monthly timeframe.
